title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.727 - No house in highway right-of-way without permission
text:
324.727.  No house in highway right-of-way without permission. — The house to be transported will not be loaded, unloaded, nor parked, day or night, on a highway right-of-way without specific permission from the director.
(L. 2001 H.B. 567)
